title: Soul Train Live Music Cookout at Historic Fourth Ward Park
description: Outdoor cookout with live soul, R&B and funk acts. Pack a blanket, grab some BBQ, and soak in the vibes. Great energy, totally free to attend, food vendors on site.
location: Historic Fourth Ward Park, Atlanta — Sat Apr 11, 2–10 PM

title: To Be Continued — Juan Miguel Palacios Solo Exhibition + Artist Talk
description: Intimate solo exhibition at Luca Fine Art with a live artist talk. Follow it up with a walk through the surrounding Virginia-Highland neighborhood and dinner somewhere nearby.
location: Luca Fine Art, Atlanta — Sat Apr 11, 6–8 PM (talk starts 6 PM)

title: Ali Wong Live at The Tabernacle
description: Hilarious, sharp standup from Ali Wong (Baby Cobra / Hard Knock Wife). The Tabernacle is a gorgeous historic venue in the heart of downtown Atlanta.
location: The Tabernacle, Atlanta — Sat Apr 11, 7 PM
